com.mentor.chs.api.servicedoc

Interface IXResourceGenerator<T extends IXObject>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - indicates the type of object for which resources will be generated parameter. The same class must be returned by the method getObjectType() of the class. Currently only the following classes are supported IXProject, IXDesign, IXDiagram and IXObject. If any other value is specified, then the plugin will be ignored. However, support for additional classes may be added in the future.

    Following is a sample implementation of the interface for IXProject object type. Similiarly it can be implemented for other supported types. 

         
 		public class URIProjectDataGeneratorImpl implements IXResourceGenerator<IXProject>
 		{
 			public boolean generateResources(IXProject project, IXPackagerContext context, IXResourceGeneratorResult result)
 			{
 				//Do some processing here
 				try
 				{
 					//Add a resource that will be bundled into package
 					URI resourceToBeBundledIntoPackage = new URI("file:///C:/platformInformation.html");
 					result.addResource(resourceToBeBundledIntoPackage, "platformInformation", true);
 					//Add a resource that will be linked from package
 					URI resorcesToBeLinkedFromPackage = new URI("http://mechanicaldocs.com/servicedocs");
 					result.addResource(resorcesToBeLinkedFromPackage, "mechanicaldocs", false);
 				}
 				catch (URISyntaxException ignore)
 				{
 					return false;
 				}
 				return true;
 			}
 			public Class<IXProject> getObjectType()
 			{
 				return IXProject.class;
 			}
 			public String getDescription()
 			{
 				return "Plugin Description";
 			}
 			public String getName()
 			{
 				return "Plugin Name";
 			}
 			public String getVersion()
 			{
 				return "Plugin Version";
 			}
 		}
    All Superinterfaces:
    IXGenerator, IXPlugin

    public interface IXResourceGenerator<T extends IXObject>
extends IXGenerator
    Generic interface which can be implemented to create resource generators for classes that implement IXObject.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean generateResources(T object, IXPackagerContext context, IXResourceGeneratorResult result)
      Generates resources for the specified object.
      java.lang.Class<T> getObjectType()
      Type of object for which this generator can generate resources.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • generateResources

        boolean generateResources(T object,
                          IXPackagerContext context,
                          IXResourceGeneratorResult result)
        Generates resources for the specified object. Called for each object of type specified by getObjectType() within the scope of the package.
        Parameters:
        object - to generate resources for
        context - Packager context with information about the package generation
        result - object to register generated resources with
        Returns:
        true if data is generated successfully or false otherwise. If false is returned, all resources registered with the result will be ignored

      • getObjectType

        java.lang.Class<T> getObjectType()
        Type of object for which this generator can generate resources.
        Returns:
        supported subtype of IXObject please refer to IXResourceGenerator for details
